title: Find All Primes
hints: Use Sieve of Eratosthenes algorithm to find all primes efficiently.
Create a boolean array is_prime of size (A+1), initialize all as true.
For each number i from 2 to sqrt(A), if i is prime, mark all multiples of i as false.
After the sieve, collect all indices where is_prime[i] is true.
The time complexity is O(n log log n) which is very efficient for large values of A.
